channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bring Me The Horizon Reimagines Debut Album in Manchester Concert
item.description: Bring Me The Horizon recently performed a reimagined version of their 2006 debut album 'Count Your Blessings' at Manchester's BEC Arena, titled 'Repented'. The concert, billed as 'Outbreak Presents: C...

item.title: American firm plans to close B.C. plant, sparking government concern over job losses
item.description: An American company, Central Moloney Inc., has announced plans to close its Fraser Valley industrial plant in Chilliwack, British Columbia, which was acquired two years ago. The closure, expected by t...

item.title: Patrick Riang’a Explains Why Goliath wa Bungoma Can’t Work Together
item.description: Patrick Riang’a, who recently left his role as operations manager at Carsoko, addressed rumors about why he didn’t take Goliath wa Bungoma with him to his new workplace. In an interview, Patrick expla...

item.title: Roosters dominate Eels in milestone game for Tupou despite Origin absences
item.description: The Roosters secured a dominant victory over the Eels in a thrilling NRL clash, with Daniel Tupou celebrating his 300th NRL game in style. Tupou scored a try from a bomb by Hugo Savala, showcasing his...

item.title: Nigerian Journalist Freed After IPI Nigeria Intervenes in DSS Detention Case
item.description: The Nigerian National Committee of the International Press Institute (IPI Nigeria) has announced the release of journalist Zainab Sodiq, who was detained by the Department of State Services (DSS) over...

item.title: Australia's EV Market Surpasses Records as Tesla Dominates Sales
item.description: The article highlights Australia's rapid shift toward electric vehicles (EVs), with Tesla's Model Y surpassing all previous car models in June 2026. This marks a significant milestone in the nation's ...

item.title: 15 Indian tourists killed in Vietnam boat accident
item.description: A video has surfaced showing a boat capsizing off Phu Quoc Island in Vietnam, resulting in the deaths of at least 15 Indian tourists. The incident, which occurred on July 11, 2026, involved a speedboa...

item.title: Trump threatens military retaliation against Iran following assassination plot warnings
item.description: President Donald Trump has issued explicit threats of massive military strikes against Iran in the event of an assassination attempt, according to a Fox News report. The warning comes after Israeli in...

item.title: Jay-Z's 30th Anniversary Shows Highlight Authenticity and Community Connection
item.description: Jay-Z's 30th-anniversary celebration at Yankee Stadium marked a significant cultural event, blending music, community engagement, and local pride. The rapper's anniversary shows, part of a broader ser...

item.title: Sudbury City Council Member Announces Retirement
item.description: The article reports on the retirement announcement of the longest-serving member of Sudbury's city council. The individual, who has held their position for an extended period, has decided to step down...

item.title: US Congressman Detained by Israeli Settlers During West Bank Visit, Raises Concerns Over Occupation
item.description: US Congressman Ro Khanna was detained by Israeli settlers during a visit to the West Bank, sparking debates over occupation and international law. The incident highlights tensions between Israel and P...

item.title: US Democrat Ro Khanna Detained by Israeli Settlers During West Bank Visit
item.description: US Democratic legislator Ro Khanna, a progressive representative from California, was detained by Israeli settlers armed with US-made rifles during a visit to the West Bank. The incident occurred whil...

item.title: Babu Owino Launches Nairobi County Pool Championship with KSh 5 Million Prize Fund
item.description: Babu Owino, Embakasi East Member of Parliament, has launched the inaugural Nairobi County Pool Championship, a constituency-based billiards tournament with a total prize fund of KSh 5,000,000. The com...

item.title: Cristina Cornejo's Journey in Creating a Fragrance Brand
item.description: Cristina Cornejo's story is a testament to the power of passion and purpose in entrepreneurship. The article details her journey of establishing a fragrance brand, highlighting how her deep love for s...

item.title: DVAC Seizes ₹6.14 Lakh from Orathanadu Taluk Agri Office Over Corruption Allegations
item.description: The Directorate of Vigilance and Anti-Corruption (DVAC) personnel seized a sum of ₹6.14 lakh from the Orathanadu Taluk Agriculture Extension Centre on July 10 after receiving complaints from farmers a...

item.title: Community Concerns Over Proposed Palestine House SA Centre for Human Rights in Durban
item.description: The Sherwood Residents Association (SRA) in Durban has raised concerns over the development of a Palestine House SA Centre for Human Rights in Browns Grove. The SRA criticized the lack of transparency...

item.title: Kipipiri MP Wanjiku Muhia Suspends Fundraiser for IEBC Fine Amid Legal Consultation
item.description: Kipipiri MP Wanjiku Muhia has asked her supporters to pause fundraising efforts to cover a KSh 1.5m fine imposed by the IEBC following inflammatory remarks during the Ol Kalou by-election campaigns. T...

item.title: Switzerland Prepares to Challenge Argentina in World Cup Quarter-Final
item.description: Switzerland's captain, Granit Xhaka, has vowed his team will give their all in Saturday's FIFA World Cup quarter-final against Argentina, aiming to reach the last four for the first time in decades. T...

item.title: Pakistan to Lead OIC Ministerial Conference on Women's Empowerment
item.description: Pakistan is set to host the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation's (OIC) 9th Ministerial Conference on Women from July 12-13, focusing on the socio-economic and political empowerment of women across OI...

item.title: Beaconsfield Pool Enhances Accessibility for All
item.description: The Beaconsfield pool, a beloved summer destination since 1967, has recently completed significant accessibility upgrades to ensure inclusivity for individuals with reduced mobility. The $100,000 proj...
